message:
Hii my handsome man. Welcome to another day where I just wanna give you everything i wish i had, a love that’s uncontainable, strong and always present. So if I ever seem like too much its only because I’m trying to fill the voids in both our hearts with something real. I hope you can understand you mean more to me than words can express. Every moment with you feels like treasure and I never want to doubt your worth. Your happiness matter to me more than anything and I will do anything to make you smile. I know I may not be perfect but my heart is genuine. All i know is to make you feel cherished in ways I never knew. I want to be the safe space where you feel loved, understood and valued no matter what. If i come strong its because I believe you deserve the kind of love that is beyond limits. You deserve to be adored every single day. In return all i want from you is to let me love thats it♥️


And yes yet another day of crushing over you each and every second🫀
